title: dactylorhiza majalis subsp. traunsteinerioides
intro: Dactylorhiza majalis subsp. traunsteinerioides, commonly known as the Traunstein's orchid, is a subspecies of orchid native to Northern Europe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza majalis subsp. traunsteinerioides include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared for consumption as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of tinctures or capsules, although its use should be advised under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with medications.
